title: Optimize model training with Azure Machine Learning
summary: Learn how to optimize model training in Azure Machine Learning by using scripts, jobs, components and pipelines.

sections.title: Optimize model training with Azure Machine Learning
sections.summary: Learn how to optimize model training in Azure Machine Learning by using scripts, jobs, components and pipelines.

lessons.title: Run a training script as a command job in Azure Machine Learning
lessons.content_md:
Run a command job with the Azure Machine Learning Python SDK v2.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/run-training-script-command-job-azure-machine-learning/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Run a training script as a command job in Azure Machine Learning

lessons.title: Track model training with MLflow in jobs
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to track model training with MLflow in jobs when running scripts.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/train-models-training-mlflow-jobs/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Track model training with MLflow in jobs

lessons.title: Perform hyperparameter tuning with Azure Machine Learning
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to perform hyperparameter tuning with a sweep job in Azure Machine Learning.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/perform-hyperparameter-tuning-azure-machine-learning-pipelines/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Perform hyperparameter tuning with Azure Machine Learning

lessons.title: Run pipelines in Azure Machine Learning
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to create and use components to build pipeline in Azure Machine Learning. Run and schedule Azure Machine Learning pipelines to automate machine learning workflows.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/run-pipelines-azure-machine-learning/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Run pipelines in Azure Machine Learning

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Optimize model training with Azure Machine Learning
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Optimize model training with Azure Machine Learning**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
